sentiment: Extreme Fear (CNN F&G 15, Crypto F&G 10). Iran war + Strait of Hormuz disruption driving oil to $98. Gold crashed 17% from $5,400 to $4,491 on USD strength + rate-cut repricing. S&P 500 at 6,506, below 50-day MA (6,818). Fed held 3.5-3.75% on Mar 18, signaled only 1 cut in 2026.
fed_policy: Rates held at 3.5-3.75% (Mar 18). Dot plot: 1 cut in 2026, 1 in 2027. PCE inflation forecast raised to 2.7%. Dual pressure: oil-driven inflation vs softening labour. Next FOMC: May 6-7.
next_major_catalyst: US PCE Inflation (Mar 28), EU CPI Flash (Mar 31), OPEC+ Meeting (Apr 1), US ISM Manufacturing (Apr 1), US Non-Farm Payrolls (Apr 4).

strategy_adjustments.macro-volatility: Prime window. VIX 26.78, Iran war ongoing, Strait of Hormuz 70% traffic reduction. Key events next 10 days: PCE (Mar 28), EU CPI (Mar 31), OPEC+ (Apr 1), NFP (Apr 4). Gold crashed 17% from $5,400 — watch for stabilisation before entry. WTI at $98, supply disruption ongoing. EUR/USD at 1.159 on safe-haven USD demand. Favour post-data directional trades over pre-positioning.
strategy_adjustments.earnings-momentum: Light earnings week ahead. Major Q4 season is complete. Focus on post-earnings gap follow-throughs from recent reports (MU, FDX, ACN reported Mar 18-19). Pre-earnings run-ups carry elevated risk in high-vol regime — require 4/4 beat history + RSI confirmation. Avoid pre-earnings positions if macro event falls within 24h.
strategy_adjustments.post-shock: High-vol regime creates fresh shock candidates. Gold crash (-17% in 2 sessions from $5,400 to $4,491) is the standout new setup — watch GLD for stabilisation. Tech selloff (XLK down ~4% in Feb, continued weakness) may produce rebound candidates. Require Category B classification + 4/5 recovery signals given regime. Max 5 positions.
strategy_adjustments.crypto: BTC at $68,301, down from $76K highs. Crypto Fear & Greed at 10 (Extreme Fear) — contrarian bullish for BTC only. Altcoins capped at LOW conviction. BTC-first gate: if BTC doesn't qualify for MODERATE, empty the file. Max 3 positions in high-vol regime. ETF flow data and on-chain accumulation are the key signals.
strategy_adjustments.pair-trades: Regime-neutral pairs most valuable now. Core themes: energy beneficiary vs oil-cost victim (XOM/UAL, CVX/DAL), safe-haven vs cyclical (GLD/SPY if gold stabilises, NEM/CCL), defense vs leisure (LMT/CCL). Gold crash creates potential new pairs (short GLD vs long something?). Tighten spread stops to -3%. Max 2 pairs per short leg.

notes: All data sourced March 22, 2026 18:00 UTC.
